directive_events.owner_directive: Plan: write manager dispatch checklist under docs/planning/, dispatch 3 no-context audit agents, then land 3 per-lens audit reports + 1 consolidated index under docs/audit/. No implementation code changes.

docs_events.rationale: Audit-evidence-only PR (reports under docs/audit/ + dispatch checklist); no user-facing or behavioral change to record.

owner_directive: Manager dispatches 3 no-context audit_reviewer agents (may read only ADRs/specs/docs/code/tests; not issues, gate records, PR claims, or manager summaries) to find doc/contract drift, layer & module routing/boundary problems, and serious code bugs; land severity-ordered audit reports under docs/audit/ in a new PR.

test_events.rationale: Manager/audit task adds only docs/audit reports and a docs/planning dispatch checklist; no implementation code paths change, so no test add/modify is required.
